sourceMovie.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hotel Transylvania 2 works as a animation movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The animation and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hotel Transylvania
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hotel Transylvania 2 clicked for you, Hotel Transylvania (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hotel Transylvania 2 clicked for you, Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hotel Transylvania 2?
faq.answer: Try Hotel Transylvania, Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation, Hotel Transylvania: Transformania—each shares DNA with Hotel Transylvania 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hotel Transylvania 2?
faq.answer: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015) is best described as Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hotel Transylvania 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Hotel Transylvania Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
